title: Virtual Reality Horror
body:
# WARNING:Contains disturbing imagery and scenes.
**Also feel free to modify this modpack as much as you want, with more scary mods to spook you!**

Includes my options file, to have my keybinds, settings, etc...
Comes with a spooky shaderpack!
And I hope you enjoy.


_**I also want to make a discord to talk with everyone and so yall can report stuff, but im just too lazy, well see.**_
